description:
You are an IT Project Manager. A service request titled 'New Employee IT Onboarding - John Martinez' exists in ServiceDesk Plus. Break this request down by adding the following three tasks to it:

Task 1:
- Title: Provision laptop and peripherals
- Description: Order and configure a new Dell Latitude 5550 laptop with standard peripherals including 27-inch monitor, wireless keyboard, mouse, and USB headset for the new hire.

Task 2:
- Title: Install standard software suite
- Description: Install corporate OS image, Microsoft 365 Business, Cisco AnyConnect VPN client, CrowdStrike Falcon endpoint protection, and Slack desktop client on the provisioned laptop.

Task 3:
- Title: Configure network and email access
- Description: Create Active Directory account, configure Exchange Online mailbox, generate VPN credentials, assign security groups, and map department shared network drives.

metadata.parent_request_title: New Employee IT Onboarding - John Martinez
